reports.title: gemma-4 - Google DeepMind开源模型
reports.description_en: Gemma 4 open models released by Google DeepMind
reports.title_zh:
The user wants me to translate "gemma-4 - Google DeepMind开源模型" into Chinese, and only output the Chinese translation without any explanation.

This appears to be the name of a model "gemma-4" and its description "Google DeepMind开源模型" (Google DeepMind open source model).

The translation should just be:
gemma-4 - Google DeepMind开源模型

Wait, but the user said "翻译成中文" (translate into Chinese). Let me think
reports.description_zh: Google DeepMind 发布的 Gemma 4 开源模型

reports.title: Mistral Voxtral TTS、Forge、Leanstral与Mistral 4发布
reports.summary: Latent Space播客访谈Mistral团队，讨论Voxtral TTS语音生成模型、Forge平台、Leanstral形式化证明以及Mistral 4模型。Voxtral是Mistral首个音频模型，采用自回归流匹配架构，支持9种语言，3B参数。讨论了开源战略、AI for Science方向、以及在形式化验证领域的探索。
reports.name: Latent Space
reports.bio: Latent Space播客 - AI行业访谈与讨论
reports.bio_en: The Latent Space podcast - AI industry interviews and discussions
reports.summary_en: Latent Space podcast interview with Mistral team discussing Voxtral TTS, Forge, Leanstral, and Mistral 4. Voxtral is Mistral's first audio model with auto-regressive flow matching architecture, supporting 9 languages, 3B parameters. Discussion covered open source strategy, AI for Science direction, and exploration in formal verification.
reports.title_zh: Mistral Voxtral TTS、Forge、Leanstral与Mistral 4发布
reports.summary_zh: They want only the translation results, one per line, without other content.

reports.title: Peter Yang (@petergyang) X动态
reports.summary: Peter Yang分享了移动端和短视频对年轻一代的影响，以及与OpenClaw和上海迪士尼的互动。
reports.name: Peter Yang
reports.bio: 分享极其实用的AI教程和访谈 | https://t.co/XYKTmGVH14 有14万+读者 | Roblox产品经理

tweets.text: 我觉得移动端和短视频的结合已经毁掉了一整代孩子的脑子。
tweets.text_en: I think the combination of mobile and short video has rotted the brains of an entire generation of kids.

tweets.text: 我和我的OpenClaw准备好去上海迪士尼啦 https://t.co/IyfrvZiIEl
tweets.text_en: Me and my OpenClaw are ready for Disneyland Shanghai https://t.co/IyfrvZiIEl

reports.bio_en: I share extremely practical AI tutorials and interviews | Join 140K+ readers at https://t.co/XYKTmGVH14 | Product at Roblox
reports.summary_en: Peter Yang shared thoughts on mobile and short video's impact on the younger generation, and interactions with OpenClaw and Disneyland Shanghai.
reports.title_zh: Peter Yang (@petergyang) X动态
reports.summary_zh: Peter Yang分享了他对手机和短视频对年轻一代影响的看法，以及与OpenClaw和上海迪士尼乐园的互动。

reports.title: Nan Yu (@thenanyu) X动态
reports.summary: Nan Yu分享了Doona婴儿车是Notion式产品的观点，以及Linear Agent可以让非工程师直接读代码了解应用行为。
reports.name: Nan Yu

tweets.text_en: Doona is the Notion of strollers https://t.co/nAAanA98vM

tweets.text: 如果你是PM、销售或支持，有多少次你需要麻烦工程师来了解应用到底是怎么工作的？Linear Agent可以直接读代码告诉你。
tweets.text_en: If you're a PM or on sales or support, how many times have you needed to bother an engineer to find out exactly how the app works? Linear Agent can just read the code and tell you.

reports.summary_en: Nan Yu shared thoughts on Doona being the Notion of strollers, and how Linear Agent can help non-engineers understand app behavior by reading code directly.
reports.title_zh: Nan Yu (@thenanyu) X动态
reports.summary_zh: Nan Yu分享了关于Doona是婴儿车的概念的想法，以及Linear Agent如何通过直接阅读代码来帮助非工程师理解应用程序的行为。

reports.title: Cat Wu (@_catwu) X动态
reports.summary: Cat Wu分享了在Claude移动端App上随时迸发灵感，然后在笔记本上继续工作的体验，支持会话无缝同步到本地CLI。
reports.name: Cat Wu

tweets.text: 我喜欢在Claude移动端App上随时迸发灵感，然后在笔记本上继续工作。我们支持轻松将会话同步到本地CLI。
tweets.text_en: I love using Claude Code on Claude mobile app to fire off ideas on the go, then pick them up on my laptop later. We support easily teleporting sessions to your local CLI.

reports.summary_en: Cat Wu shared experience using Claude Code on mobile app to brainstorm on the go and pick up sessions on laptop later.

reports.summary_zh: They want each translation on a separate line, maintaining the original order, and only output the translation results - nothing else.

reports.title: Thariq (@trq212) X动态
reports.summary: Thariq宣布Claude Code渲染器重写，使用虚拟视口，支持鼠标操作，提示词输入固定在底部等多项UX改进（不是愚人节玩笑）。
reports.name: Thariq
reports.bio:
Anthropic Claude Code工程师。前YC W20，MIT媒体实验室。
迈向充满爱的机器

tweets.text: 不是愚人节玩笑，我们重写了Claude Code渲染器使用虚拟视口 - 可以用鼠标了，提示词输入框固定在底部，还有很多人要求的UX改进
tweets.text_en:
not an April Fools joke, we rewrote the Claude Code renderer to use a virtual viewport

you can use your mouse, the prompt input stays at the bottom, and a lot more small UX wins people have been asking for

it's experimental so give us your feedback https://t.co/VqXbsfSlTJ

reports.bio_en:
Claude Code @anthropicai.   prev YC W20, mit media lab. 
towards machines of loving grace
reports.summary_en: Thariq announced Claude Code renderer rewrite using virtual viewport, supporting mouse operations, fixed prompt input at bottom, and many UX improvements.
reports.title_zh: Thariq (@trq212) X动态
reports.summary_zh: Thariq 宣布使用虚拟视口重写 Claude Code 渲染器，支持鼠标操作，修复了底部的提示输入，以及许多用户体验改进。
